title: Senior Buyer
description:
Job responsibilities:

  • Prepare inquiry documentation.
  • Obtain RFQ/Bid Tenders from suppliers.
  • Evaluate commercial aspects of RFQ/Bid tender.
  • Effect purchase orders for materials and/or services through the SAP system.
  • Follow up material and procurement plans.
  • Invoice handling with suppliers and finance.
  • Close-out of purchase orders.
  • Other relevant supply chain/procurement activities.
  • Contribute to a good working environment in their project team(s).
  • Provide information to colleagues and make sure that relevant information is obtained from other discipline is shared accordingly.
  • Contribute to on-the-job training for oneself and others.
  • Where applicable, manage performance of and provide feedback to subordinates. Feedback shall be documented on a regular basis and distributed to HR / Procurement Manager in department as required.
  • Manage conflicts involving subordinates.

Work experience requirements:

  • Lack of formal education can be compensated with relevant experience according to Aibel position matrix.
  • Min 8-10 years of experience with different types of tasks within the procurement discipline.
  • Ability to have discipline responsibility and conduct training within the discipline.
  • Ability to guide others and control the work performed by others.
  • Has excellent oral and written English skills.
  • Possesses good planning skills and the ability to understand and deliver in accordance with project schedule.
  • Is up to date on methods, tools and regulations within the procurement discipline.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's or master's Degree in the relevant discipline.

Other skills:

  • High degree of ethical awareness, integrity and compliance.
  • Be cooperative and have good working attitude.
  • High degree of commercial awareness including negotiation, planning skills.
  • High degree of efficiency, productivity and project delivery mindset.
  • High loyalty to deadline and quality requirements in project.
  • Able to work independently as well as in team in project.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
AIBEL PTE. LTD.

Aibel AS is a leading service company that works within the oil, gas and renewable energy sectors. We provide our clients with the best engineering, construction, upgrading and maintenance solutions.

 

Aibel’s Singapore office is an international execution centre offering the full range of studies and EPC services for international offshore and onshore projects. In addition to executing stand alone projects, the Singapore office also carries out engineering support for other Aibel execution centres, and is involved in both studies and detailed engineering projects for major customers such as Statoil, Shell and ConocoPhillips.
